title: CHILDREN'S RELIEF NURSERY SERVICES - 211info
text: PIONEER RELIEF NURSERY CHILDREN'S RELIEF NURSERY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides family support, referrals, advocacy, respite care, and parenting classes to parents who are experiencing high levels of stress. Therapeutic classrooms for toddlers and preschoolers and home visits provided as well. 1312 SW 2nd Street Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Parents experiencing stress with children ages 0-6 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 215-1017 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 215-1017 Main phone Main phone (541) 215-1017 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for eligibility screening FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Umatilla County, primarily City of Pendleton TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near the old St. Anthony's Hospital in Pendleton. Across from Til Taylor Park. Services: Child Abuse Prevention Child Guidance * At Risk Families Children's Out of Home Respite Care * At Risk Families Family Support Centers/Outreach Home Based Parenting Education * At Risk Families Parenting Skills Classes * At Risk Families If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
